name: Dungeon Depth
description: A dark, foreboding dungeon beneath the earth.

dungeon_entrance.name: Dungeon Entrance Interior
dungeon_entrance.description: The entry threshold inside the dark dungeon, damp and drafty.
dungeon_entrance.discovery_text: You step inside. The darkness swallows you.

dungeon_level_1.name: Dungeon Level 1
dungeon_level_1.description: The first level of the dungeon. Torches flicker on the walls, casting long shadows. You hear distant dripping water.
dungeon_level_1.discovery_text: Torches gutter as you descend. The air is thick.
dungeon_level_1.ambient_text: Water drips steadily in the distance.

dungeon_level_2.name: Dungeon Level 2
dungeon_level_2.description: The deepest level of the dungeon. The air is thick and oppressive. Something powerful lurks here.
dungeon_level_2.discovery_text: The deepest darkness. The air itself feels hostile.
dungeon_level_2.ambient_text: A low growl echoes from the shadows.
